title: Fullstack Engineer
description: Hired by Gebeya as a vendor to work in the digital channels team at Safaricom, submitting and working on fullstack in-house projects related to the internet provider infrastructure.

title: Front End Engineer
description: Worked on the main landing page for Merkatosphare LLC, a startup that helps with e-commerce products under Ethiopia and Eritrea — facilitating product sales, talent hiring, and rental services on their platform.

title: Fullstack Software Engineer
description: Worked on Lussia — a student-focused chat platform with gamification features to help students ace exams and improve results through question-based scoring and interactive learning.

title: Fullstack Engineer
description: Worked with one of the greatest teams creating an automation studio for pipelines, vector databases, chat interfaces with documents, and synthetic data generation. Used an in-house fine-tuned AI model. Also developed a Medical Assessment App, Meal Planner, and Eido Movie/Music Recommendation app.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer
description: Designed and developed an ERP system for a University College — managing classes, examinations, registration, and school fees — increasing student interactivity by 65%. Also built a Content Management System and landing page hosted on Digital Ocean VPS.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Built a multi-tenant Event Management System with dashboards for event holders and employees. Implemented voucher generation for purchased tickets, Pespal and bank payment methods, and event add-ons, activities, and location types.

title: Software Engineer
description: Accelerated development of the Digital Mekato e-commerce platform by 45% through smart systems. Implemented user-friendly features for a seamless shopping experience. The platform lists local Ethiopian items and processes payments via Chapa gateway.

title: Software Engineer
description: Established robust client-server communication addressing security issues for an optimised dashboard. Developed the Ethiochef E-commerce Web Dashboard using Next.js with TypeScript and ShadcnUI. Maintained backend API and payment gateway integrations.

title: Student Parliament President
description: Led the student parliament — Vice President for three semesters, President for one — enhancing student life and communication with university administration. Demonstrated exceptional adaptive leadership while managing full academic and leadership responsibilities.
